trans-unit.note: Bundle display name
Bundle name

trans-unit.source: We use the microphone so you can practice pronouncing words and sentences aloud. Audio is not stored.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Microphone Usage Description

trans-unit.source: This app uses on-device speech recognition to check your pronunciation.
trans-unit.note: Privacy - Speech Recognition Usage Description
The price of a free trial, displayed in the "Due today" section of the view.
A label displayed below the price of a free trial.
A text view displaying the current streak of days in a row that the user has successfully logged practice.
A title within the streak card displaying the number of consecutive days the user has taken their medication.
A text label indicating a percentage increase or decrease in a value compared to the previous week. The argument is the percentage change.
A label displaying the number of XP points earned for completing a daily goal. The argument is the number of XP points gained.
A text view displaying the weekly growth percentage of a user's progress in the app. The text shows a positive sign followed by the percentage value, followed by "% vs last week".
A section header that lists the user's achievements.

trans-unit.id: Allow emails and notifications to get a reminder.
trans-unit.source: Allow emails and notifications to get a reminder.
trans-unit.note: A description below the trial timeline that explains the purpose of allowing emails and notifications.

trans-unit.id: Allow notifications not to miss your practice time.
trans-unit.source: Allow notifications not to miss your practice time.
trans-unit.note: A description of the benefits of allowing notifications to remind users of their training time.

trans-unit.id: Already have an account? Sign In
trans-unit.source: Already have an account? Sign In
trans-unit.note: A link that allows a user to sign in if they already have an account.
A greeting at the top of the checkout view, including the user's name.

trans-unit.id: Based on real science. Tap any link to learn more.
trans-unit.source: Based on real science. Tap any link to learn more.
trans-unit.note: A footer text that explains the credibility of the scientific method view. It also includes a call to action to learn more.

trans-unit.id: Boost your language skills with Elo effortlessly anytime, anywhere.
trans-unit.source: Boost your language skills with Elo effortlessly anytime, anywhere.
trans-unit.note: A description of the app's features, emphasizing its ease of use and effectiveness in language learning.
The text on a button that says "Continue".
A button label for creating a new account.
A title for the daily streak section of the view.
A description of the action that completes a user's daily goal.
A label displayed above the user's current streak of days practicing.
A question displayed above the list of fun facts.

trans-unit.id: Don't have an account? Sign Up
trans-unit.source: Don't have an account? Sign Up
trans-unit.note: A button label that directs users to sign up if they don't have an account.
The text for a button that, when pressed, dismisses a sheet. In this context, it dismisses a sheet that lists more interests.
A label indicating that the free trial is due today.
The title of the premium subscription.

trans-unit.id: Elo will call you by this name.
trans-unit.source: Elo will call you by this name.
trans-unit.note: A description below the text field where the user can enter their name.
A label for the email field in the authentication view.
A button label that translates to "Enable Microphone in Settings".

trans-unit.id: Enable microphone access in Settings to practice speaking.
trans-unit.source: Enable microphone access in Settings to practice speaking.
trans-unit.note: A description of how to enable microphone access in settings to practice speaking.
A label for the text field where the user enters their name.
The text on a button that, when pressed, directs the user to view their personalized learning plan.
A call-to-action text that appears below the "Start learning for free →" button in the paywall.

trans-unit.id: Hold your first confident English sentence in just 7 days, using our science-backed method.
trans-unit.source: Hold your first confident English sentence in just 7 days, using our science-backed method.

trans-unit.id: How you will learn every word.
trans-unit.source: How you will learn every word.
trans-unit.note: A subtitle displayed below the main title of the scientific method view.

trans-unit.id: I will remind you of your training time every day
trans-unit.source: I will remind you of your training time every day
trans-unit.note: A description of how the app will remind users of their training time.

trans-unit.id: In which areas would you like to improve your English?
trans-unit.source: In which areas would you like to improve your English?
trans-unit.note: A question displayed to the user about their English improvement goals.
A button label that encourages the user to continue their streak.
The text on a button that, when pressed, navigates to the next screen in an onboarding flow.
A label displaying the user's current level. The argument is the user's current level.
A button that allows a user to log in to the app.

trans-unit.id: Many have started with the same goals — and Elo English got them there.
trans-unit.source: Many have started with the same goals — and Elo English got them there.
trans-unit.note: A paragraph describing the success stories of other users.
A description of the main feature of the app.
A message displayed when the user's microphone access is disabled.
The title of a sheet that lists additional interests.
A button that, when pressed, expands the list of available languages.
A footer text below the "Get yearly access →" button in the paywall.
A label for a password field.
A description of the process of customizing a user's learning plan.

trans-unit.id: Pick a time of the day to start your practice every day
trans-unit.source: Pick a time of the day to start your practice every day
trans-unit.note: A description explaining the purpose of the view.
A prompt instructing the user to select their interests.
A link to the privacy policy of the app.
A label displayed as the title for the "Progress" tab in the main tab view.
A label describing the time picker in the view.
A button that allows users to restore purchases.
A badge indicating that the content is scientifically backed.
A badge displaying the step number.
The title of a sheet that lists all available languages.
A label for the settings tab in the main tab view.
A button that takes the user to a view showing all available learning plans.
A button that allows a user to sign up or sign in.
A button that allows a user to sign up or sign in.
A button label that appears when the user selects the weekly premium offer.
A link to the terms of use.
The title of the third section in the "Scientific Method" view.
A tab label for the "Today" tab in the main tab view.
A button that translates text to French when pressed.
The title of the screen that appears when a user successfully completes a daily word challenge.
A label displayed below the "Sign In" button in the authentication view.
The title of the welcome screen.

trans-unit.id: What are your long-term goals for learning English?
trans-unit.source: What are your long-term goals for learning English?
trans-unit.note: A question displayed to the user about their long-term learning goals.

trans-unit.id: What do you want to achieve with Elo English?
trans-unit.source: What do you want to achieve with Elo English?
trans-unit.note: A question displayed to the user about their short-term language goals.

trans-unit.id: What is your level of English?
trans-unit.source: What is your level of English?
trans-unit.note: A question displayed to the user asking them to select their English proficiency level.
A prompt asking the user what name they would like to be called by.
A question displayed to the user about their daily exercise goal.
A question displayed to the user about their native language.
A label displaying the user's current XP score. The argument is the user's current XP score.
A description below the list of interests, explaining that they can only select up to 4.
A title displayed in the "Goals Confirmation" view.
A title describing the user's free trial period.
A label displayed as a step separator in a stepper interface.
A description of a free trial period for a limited time.
A checkmark emoji used to indicate that an achievement is unlocked.
A celebratory text that appears when a user levels up in the app. The argument is the current level of the user.
An unlocked badge icon.
A text label showing the duration of the current streak. The argument is the current streak count.
A label displaying the current streak count. The argument is the current streak count.
